docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENOS, ROBERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIU, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENOS, ROBERT $4,030.00 PRINCIPAL, $54.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,084.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. AVAILABLE EVIDENCE DID ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD PROPERLY NOTIFIED THE DMV OF TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SIU, PATRICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ENOS, ROBERT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,912.72 FILED BY SIU, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT ENOS, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ROBERT ENOS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED 07/19/10. FULLY SATISFIED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ENOS, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
